project.name: 知信信息追踪 V4
project.designRead: Information tracking platform / researchers & analysts / editorial luxury with breathing rhythm / medium-low density / avoid neon AI hero

typographySystem.display: Playfair Display / Georgia / Noto Serif SC

styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceDepthModel: border-first, shadow max 0.05 alpha for static, 0.12 for modal only
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: glass-panel + solid-panel, restrained radius, pill buttons
styleContinuityAnchors.motionLanguage: breathing dots, gentle float, fade-up-in, tilted card hover

pages.title: 首页
pages.visualNorthStar: OFF+BRAND iridescent orb hero + breathing dots + editorial display typography
pages.compositionPattern: full-viewport hero with iridescent orb, asymmetric 60/40 split, breathing dot cluster, three floating feature cards with tilt

continuityAnchors.nav: minimal ghost-link top bar, logo left, pill nav right

pages.title: 登录
pages.visualNorthStar: Minimal centered glass card on warm canvas, breathing dots cluster, ghost-link CTA
pages.compositionPattern: centered single card, left brand illustration, right form with pill tab switcher

pages.title: 工作台
pages.visualNorthStar: Glass sidebar + stat cards with breathing dot indicators, horizontal scroll latest updates
pages.compositionPattern: left glass sidebar, right content area with stat row + feature grid + horizontal scroll section

continuityAnchors.nav: left glass sidebar, 5 icon+label items, active = ink fill

pages.title: 知识图谱
pages.visualNorthStar: Full SVG canvas with organic bezier branches, floating glass-card info chips on hover
pages.compositionPattern: left thin info sidebar, center SVG graph canvas, floating info chips, bottom-right controls

pages.title: 调研报告
pages.visualNorthStar: Editorial reading surface with section accent bars, pill tags, version navigation
pages.compositionPattern: 3-column layout (sidebar / reading area / sidebar), glass reading panel, version nav at top
